hero_tekst: A comprehensive range from injection moulding and mould making to SLS 3D printing and assembly — all under one roof in Utrecht.

diensten.beschrijving: Precision injection moulding of technical plastic components in virtually all thermoplastic materials.
Fully in-house mould design and production. From single cavity to multi-cavity tooling with complex geometries.
Selective Laser Sintering for functional prototypes and small series in PA12, glass-filled and flame-retardant nylon.
Complete assembly of plastic sub-assemblies including insert placement, welding and surface treatment.
Structured quality assurance at every production stage with full traceability and inspection documentation.
We assess your design for manufacturability and proactively optimise for cost, quality and lead time.
bullets: Free DFM analysis with every quote

faq.vraag: What is the minimum order quantity?
faq.antwoord: There is no hard minimum — we deliver from 1 piece. Small series are our speciality.

faq.vraag: How long does a new mould take?
faq.antwoord: A standard single cavity mould is delivered by our team in 4-6 weeks. Expedited options available.
We process PA, PP, PE, ABS, POM, PC, PETG, PPS and more. Material advice is always free.
Yes. We offer full post-processing and assembly including ultrasonic welding, insert placement, screen printing and kitting.

faq.vraag: What does an SLS prototype cost?
faq.antwoord: SLS prototypes start from €45 per part, depending on volume and material. Delivery 24-48 hours after confirmation.
Yes, we deliver throughout Europe: Benelux, Germany, Belgium, UK and more.
